title: What It Actually Looks Like to Fight Your Sin Without Living in Shame
caption:
Confession once is repentance. Confession every hour on repeat isn't humility, it's just replaying the tape.

Guilt has a job: walk you to the cross, then leave. If it's still sitting at your table three days later, that's not conviction anymore, that's noise. Christ died for the man still doing this, not the man who's already beaten it.

Kill the sin. Don't bury the man under it.

#faith #repentance #christianman #grace #godlyman
